description: Supabase dashboard - Authentication / Users list and management interface

components.name: DataTable
components.description: React Data Grid (RDG) showing users with 9 columns: checkbox selector, UID, Display name, Email, Phone, Providers, Provider type, Created at, Last sign in at. Supports multi-select, sorting, pagination.
components.htmlSample:
UID

00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000
components.notes: Built with react-data-grid. Header is sticky. Rows are virtualized for performance. Each column is 44px height (except header 36px).

components.name: SearchInput
components.description: Search field for filtering users by email. Integrated with input-group compound component.
components.htmlSample: <input data-slot="input-group-control" placeholder="Search by email" class="w-full px-2.5 py-1 h-[26px] flex-1 block rounded-none border border-transparent text-xs" value="">
components.notes: Part of input-group wrapper. No visible border by default, focus state uses ring-0.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Checkbox for row selection (bulk actions). Used in header and each data row. Supports checked/unchecked/indeterminate states via aria-checked.
components.htmlSample: <button type="button" role="checkbox" aria-checked="false" data-state="unchecked" value="on" class="peer flex items-center justify-center h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded-sm border border-control bg-control/25 transition-colors duration-150 ease-in-out hover:border-strong focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-background-control focus-visible:ring-offset-2"></button>
components.notes: Uses data-state attr for styling. Checked state applies bg-foreground and text-background. Focus ring includes offset.

components.name: Avatar
components.description: Circular user avatar displayed next to checkbox in first column. Falls back to lucide-user icon if no image.
components.notes: 24px container. Uses CSS custom property --rdg-cell-padding. Icon is 12x12.

components.name: Button
components.description: Generic button component with size variants (tiny, sm, default, lg). Used throughout header, sidebar, and row actions.
components.htmlSample: <button data-size="tiny" type="button" aria-label="Refresh" class="relative inline-flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer rounded border text-xs px-2.5 py-1 h-[26px] hover:border-strong focus-visible:ring-2"></button>
components.notes: data-size controls padding/height. Uses Tailwind arbitrary values. Focus ring includes 2px ring-offset.

components.name: IconButton
components.description: Small button containing only an icon (lucide). Used for actions like refresh, sort, expand/collapse.
components.htmlSample: <button type="button" aria-label="Refresh" class="relative inline-flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer rounded"><svg class="lucide lucide-refresh-cw"><path d="M3 12a9 9 0 0 1 9-9 9.75 9.75 0 0 1 6.74 2.74L21 8"></path></svg></button>
components.notes: Icons are 4x4 (16px via [&_svg]). Color transitions on hover.

components.name: TableHeader
components.description: Header row of data table. Contains column headers, search input, and action buttons (Refresh, Sort, Filter).
components.htmlSample: UID
components.notes: Fixed z-index 50 for sticky positioning. Draggable=true for column reordering.

components.name: TableRow
components.description: Single data row in table. Contains checkbox, avatar, and text cells for each column value. Clickable for detail view.
components.htmlSample:
00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000

-
components.notes: Alternating even/odd classes for striping. Height 44px. aria-selected false by default.

components.name: Sidebar
components.description: Left navigation sidebar with collapsible menu items grouped by category (Manage, Notifications, Settings, Integrations). Uses data-sidebar attributes.
components.htmlSample: • Users
components.notes: Resizable sidebar with data-collapsible to show icon-only mode. Uses flex for layout. bg-sidebar is custom color token.

components.name: MenuItem
components.description: Individual navigation item in sidebar menu. Can be active or inactive. Supports nested structure.
components.htmlSample: • Users
components.notes: Active item inherits bg-sidebar-accent/50. Uses group classes for hover states.

components.name: Badge
components.description: Status or label badge displayed inline. Examples: 'Production', 'Free', 'Beta' in header. Small, rounded, with colored background.
components.htmlSample: Production
components.notes: mt-px for pixel-perfect alignment. Warning variant shown; other variants follow same pattern.

components.name: Header
components.description: Top navigation bar (12px height md:12px). Contains breadcrumbs, connection status, help menu, search, SQL editor, AI assistant, and user dropdown.
components.notes: Hidden on mobile (hidden md:flex). Responsive: h-11 mobile, h-12 desktop. Border-b for separator.

components.name: DropdownMenu
components.description: Dropdown menu for selecting options (e.g., organization/project selector in header). Uses combobox pattern.
components.notes: Uses radix-ui primitives. data-state toggles closed/open. Chevrons icon indicates expandable.

components.name: InputGroup
components.description: Compound input component that groups search input with icon prefix/suffix buttons. Wraps search box.
components.notes: Flexbox layout. -ml-px removes margin between input and adjacent button. width 245px fixed.

components.name: EmptyState
components.description: Placeholder shown when no users match search criteria or table is empty. Typically contains icon, heading, and action button.
components.htmlSample:
No users found

Try adjusting your search criteria
components.notes: min-h-[300px] ensures consistent spacing. Icon and text are centered.
